# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "metadata": {
    "description": "ARM template intentionally does not create Azure AD service principals or broad subscription-level role assignments. Use least-privilege RBAC and create identities outside ARM, then assign narrowly scoped roles."
  },
  "parameters": {
    "principalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of an existing managed identity or service principal."
      }
    },
    "roleDefinitionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Built-in role definition ID to assign. Default is Contributor; consider a narrower role."
      }
    },
    "scope": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().id]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Scope for the role assignment. Default is current resource group."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "roleAssignmentName": "[guid(parameters('scope'), parameters('principalId'), parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[variables('roleAssignmentName')]",
      "scope": "[parameters('scope')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]",
        "principalId": "[parameters('principalId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "assignedScope": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('scope')]"
    },
    "principalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('principalId')]"
    }
  }
}
